deterministic.engagement_rationale: 14 signals in the last 14 days from 8 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement is high, with 14 signals from 8 distinct contacts over the past 14 days, and product usage has surged entirely in the last 3 days — 10 events across 5 contacts with zero activity in the prior window, indicating a sharp burst of adoption. Sentiment is mixed to negative: on the positive side, Cameron Johnson drove heavy activity on 2026-05-06 (workspace creation, feature usage, settings updates, comments), Reese Garcia connected an integration the same day, and Dana Harris uploaded a file to the audit_log feature on 2026-05-08 — notable for a financial services account potentially tied to compliance workflows. However, on 2026-04-30, Jordan Thomas reported a sharp drop in reporting accuracy API calls (from ~1,200/day to ~300/day), Cameron Davis formally requested a structured SSO configuration enablement program and flagged declining data retention policy utilization, and on 2026-05-02 Kendall Wilson acknowledged that internal change management around reporting accuracy has been harder than anticipated. The account appears to be actively attempting to course-correct with renewed product exploration, but multiple unresolved adoption and utilization gaps — especially around reporting accuracy, SSO, and data retention — pose real risk.
